# DECENT Development

> Premium residential construction, duplex/triplex developments, and project management in Sydney and wider New South Wales.

## Main Navigation
- [Home](https://www.decentdevelopment.com.au/) - Homepage showing core services and licensing information.
- [Completed Projects](https://www.decentdevelopment.com.au/projects/) - Full portfolio of custom duplex, triplex, and residential builds.
- [House & Land Packages](https://www.decentdevelopment.com.au/house-and-land-packages/) - Ava Residence and Bela Residence package pathways for Sydney and NSW enquiries.
- [Meet the Team](https://www.decentdevelopment.com.au/meet-the-team/) - Profiles of our specialist builders and project managers.
- [Collaboration](https://www.decentdevelopment.com.au/collaboration/) - Collaboration details with trusted delivery partners like Milestone Development.
- [Contact Us](https://www.decentdevelopment.com.au/contact/) - Project enquiries, office address in North Sydney, and contact details.

## Technical Details
- NSW Contractor Licence: 476988C
- ACN: 679 810 327
